parameters.name: playmode
parameters.label: Play Mode
parameters.description: Specifies the method used to output LTC, there are 2 options.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: Specifies whether the count should increment or hold steady.

parameters.name: cue
parameters.label: Cue
parameters.description: While set to on, the output is held at the specified initial values below.

parameters.name: cuepulse
parameters.label: Cue Pulse
parameters.description: When pulsed, the output is set to the initial values below.

parameters.name: frame
parameters.label: Frame
parameters.description: The initial frame to count from.

parameters.name: second
parameters.label: Second
parameters.description: The initial second to count from.

parameters.name: minute
parameters.label: Minute
parameters.description: The initial minute to count from.

parameters.name: hour
parameters.label: Hour
parameters.description: The initial hour to count from.

parameters.name: framerate
parameters.label: Frame Rate
parameters.description: The number of complete frame messages per second the signal encodes. It is usually between 24 and 30. Note that although we support framerates above 30, using custom usage of the User Bits 1 field, th

parameters.name: dropframe
parameters.label: Drop Frame Numbering
parameters.description: Drop frame numbering converts 30 fps time code to the 29.97 fps NTSC standard. Frame numbers 0 and 1 are skipped during the first second of every minute, except multiples of 10 minutes.

parameters.name: timecodeop
parameters.label: Timecode Object/CHOP/DAT
parameters.description: Set the LTC output value with a reference to a timecode. Should be a reference to either a with channels 'hour', 'second', 'minute', 'frame', a with a timecode string in its first cell, or a object.

parameters.name: audiorate
parameters.label: Audio Rate
parameters.description: This audio sampling rate of the output signal.

parameters.name: user1
parameters.label: User Data 1
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 1.

parameters.name: user2
parameters.label: User Data 2
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 2.

parameters.name: user3
parameters.label: User Data 3
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 3.

parameters.name: user4
parameters.label: User Data 4
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 4.

parameters.name: user5
parameters.label: User Data 5
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 5.

parameters.name: user6
parameters.label: User Data 6
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 6.

parameters.name: user7
parameters.label: User Data 7
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 7.

parameters.name: user8
parameters.label: User Data 8
parameters.description: Send this value in the bits reserved for User Data 8.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: highfpsbehavior
parameters.label: Highfpsbehavior
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
